zh.lifeSummary: 當John Gambon於1379年之後出生在英國林可爾史爾馬爾斯頓時，他的父親Sir William Gambon Of Moreston8644歲，母親Isabelle Tucker8639歲。他於大約1416年與Idonea d Abernon在英國英格蘭戴文默頓結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1469年之後在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Gambon于1379年之后出生在英国林可爾史爾馬爾斯頓时，他的父亲Sir William Gambon Of Moreston8644岁，母亲Isabelle Tucker8639岁。他于大约1416年与Idonea d Abernon在英国英格兰戴文默頓结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1469年之后在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Gambon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Gammon
meanings: nickname from a diminutive (‘little leg’) of gamb, the Norman form of jambe ‘leg’; mb would be assimilated to mm, hence Gammon. Compare French Gambet, Gambin, Gambon.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Gambon was born after 1379, in Marston, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir William Gambon Of Moreston, was 8644 and his mother, Isabelle Tucker, was 8639. He married Idonea d Abernon about 1416, in Merton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died after 1469, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Gambon est né après 1379, à Marston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Gambon Of Moreston, avait 8644 ans et sa mère, Isabelle Tucker, avait 8639 ans. Il a épousé Idonea d Abernon environ 1416, à Merton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé après 1469, à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Gambon nach 1379 in Marston, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Gambon Of Moreston 8644 und seine Mutter Isabelle Tucker 8639. Er hat um 1416 in Merton, Devon, England, United Kingdom Idonea d Abernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1469 in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Gambon è nato il dopo il 1379 nel Marston, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Gambon Of Moreston, aveva 8644 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle Tucker, aveva 8639 anni. Lui sposato Idonea d Abernon circa 1416, nel Merton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1469, nel England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Gambonが1379年以後にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアマーストンで生まれた時，父Sir William Gambon Of Morestonは8644歳，母Isabelle Tuckerは8639歳であった。約1416年にイギリスイギリスデボンマートンでIdonea d Abernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1469年以後にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Gambon(이)가 1379년 이후 영국 링코실르 마스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Gambon Of Moreston(은)는 8644세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle Tucker(은)는 8639세였다. 그는 대략 1416년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 머턴에서 Idonea d Abernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1469년 이후 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Gambon nasceu após 1379, em Marston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Gambon Of Moreston, tinha 8644 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle Tucker, tinha 8639 anos. Ele casou-se com Idonea d Abernon aproximadamente 1416, em Merton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1469, em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Gambon родился после 1379 г. в местности марстон, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Gambon Of Moreston было 8644 года, а матери, которую звали Isabelle Tucker, 8639. Он женился на женщине по имени Idonea d Abernon около 1416 г. в местности миртон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер после 1469 г. в местности Англия.

sm.after 1379–after 1469: ina ua ma'ea le 1379–ina ua ma'ea le 1469

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Gambon nació después de 1379, en Marston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Gambon Of Moreston, tenía 8644 años y su mamá, Isabelle Tucker, tenía 8639 años. Se casó con Idonea d Abernon aproximadamente 1416, en Merton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió después de 1469, en Inglaterra.
